name: scientific-writing
description: Repo-local scientific writing setup and workflow support for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and maintain scientific paper agent config.
interface.longDescription: Bootstraps and refreshes repo-local scientific writing configuration for Codex and Claude.
defaultPrompt: Set up this repo for a new scientific paper.
Refresh the scientific writing config from the repo config.
Review what this paper config is missing.
